name: Beer Fish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the mayonnaise and catsup.
2. Add the beer, prepared mustard, lemon juice, and prepared horseradish to the mixture.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Transfer the sauce to a jar or container and chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving.
5. Serve with fish.
